input.title: Developer Docs Ranking Drift
symptoms: Relevant authentication chunks appear in top 10 but not top 5
Top-ranked chunks are semantically nearby endpoint docs

observed: Recall@10 is healthy while Recall@5 is zero
inferred: Ranking does not separate authentication-specific evidence from nearby endpoint evidence
unknown: Whether heading-path metadata would fix top-rank precision

rationale: 证据已召回但排序靠后，符合 ranking drift。
